feed: gimme some good youtube content for bust

cards.title: Physics Chose Violence At The Pool
cards.caption: March Madness of face-plants. This one belly-flopped its way into the top 50 our feed kept out of 5,000 posts. Which fail broke you first? 😂
cards.povText: POV: you told him the pool was heated

cards.title: This Is Why We Don't Grill Indoors
cards.caption: Impossible to make up, impossible to recreate. The feed sifted 5,000 posts and this fireball survived. Try not to laugh, we'll wait.
cards.quote: Impossible to make up and impossible to recreate
cards.povText: POV: the marshmallows were not worth it

cards.title: The Tiller Won. He Did Not.
cards.caption: Man vs machine, machine undefeated. Out of ~5,000 posts our feed skimmed, this launch made the cut. Press play, let the mood kick in.
cards.povText: POV: the garden had other plans

cards.title: Slip 'N Slide Ends In Orbit
cards.caption: So unhinged you can't look away, so we didn't. The feed kept the best ~50 of 5,000 and summer chaos made it. What's the worst backyard idea you've seen?
cards.quote: SO UNHINGED YOU CAN'T LOOK AWAY
cards.povText: POV: the slip 'n slide had one job

cards.title: Flying Porta Potties. Yes, Really.
cards.caption: Best fails of the decade in one video: a mattress off a car, a parasailing gone wide, a porta potty for takeoff. This survived our 5,000-post cull. Wildest one wins.
cards.quote: Flying porta potties take off, a mattress flies off a car

cards.title: Looks Like a Losing Battle
cards.caption: Epic fails compilation from America's Funniest Home Videos. Classic bouncy-castle wipeout energy. Surfaced by Threadverse.

cards.title: Fails That Got Out of Control
cards.caption: FailArmy's best fails of the week. From bad decisions to instant regret. Reliable background chaos. Curated by Threadverse.

cards.title: Caught in 4K: Best Security Cam Fails
cards.caption: Top security camera fails of 2026 so far. Driveway wipeouts and doorbell disasters. Pure filler-fun. Found via Threadverse.
